title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Franky, Nami, Tontatta, Zoro, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as rebecca’s past, the Toy Soldier, and the Riku family tragedy deepen the emotional stakes behind the Colosseum and Dressrosa’s rebellion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...I have something I want to say...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: to you people.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What the hell were you doing in there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Pop

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Gancho- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yes, it's me, the Tonta chief and King, Gancho!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'd like to thank you for this.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're putting your lives on the line to fight for us, so there's something I need you to know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Well... I'm not exactly planning on risking my life, but...

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Donquixote Dofla- Mingo- The one who plagues us at the present- and the Tontatta Tribe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Our intertwined destinies did not begin just 10 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's a history going back around 900 years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: EHA!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Here in dress- Rosa,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: is a massive field of sunflow- Ers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Here, among the beloved flowers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: hidden from all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: is a secret entrance to the under- ground.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If you head down...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Let me introduce you.

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: The valiant cries of the fairies can be heard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This toy looks real strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What sort of big human did he used to be!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Remember between

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Anti-Dofla- Mingo Orga- Nization: "Riku Royal Fighters" rebellion HQ.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: How fitting for this decisive battle!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: These are the ones we'll be fighting with!!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: The dwarves of the Tontatta kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Dwarves?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: When it comes to strength, they won't lose, even to you guys.

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: They're fast enough to evade the naked eye, and they're known in town as "fairies".

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So the one who stole zero's sword....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: quickly now!! Didn't you want to return to the ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Oi, don't let him get the upper hand, Luffy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Hey, big bro, we can't see!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ZORO!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Shit... that bastard... wish I'd known there was a Tourna- ment like this.../

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why wasn't I invited!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: My swords want to see some action.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ah, Captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Franky!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What the hell are you doing here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Captain!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We've compiled the info from the scouting Brigade!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: And we've confirmed the enemy's movement, as well as sugar's

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: And also... now don't be too shocked, but today, with the fateful battle at hand...

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: That's right!! It seems that the Tontatta's leg- endary heroes have appeared before us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Their names are "usoland" and "robiland"! Intel says they are heading this way now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: on top of that, it seems they have some friends with them. Their names are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Luffyland, zoroland, namiland, Sanland, Chopper- land, fraland, and boneland.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That must have been usopp...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What could have led to such a lie...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ah... I'm probably zoroland.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm Ireland. Nice to meet you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: EHHHHHHHHHHHHHH!!!!!!? AMAZING!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ah!! There's no time for this.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If I don't hurry back to the sunny-go, Nami and the others...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...like I've been saying this whole time!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmm?

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
